description: Cross-binding rule-engine fixtures per discretization RFC §5.2. Each fixture's `expect.canonical_json` is the byte-exact canonical form each binding's `canonical_json(rewrite(input, rules))` must produce. Error fixtures assert the engine aborts with the given stable error code.
note: Julia and Rust are the only bindings required to produce rule-engine output for Step 1 (RFC §13.1). Other bindings may round-trip the fixture's rule/input JSON without executing, or stub the rewrite step.
